notes: Although applicable for all respondents, some missing values remain if the respondent broke off before completing this section of the survey or if there were other issues with the case.

name: COVIDVAX

name: COVVAX_M
label: JI-14m Month of first COVID vaccine

name: COVVAX_Y
label: JI-14y Year of first COVID vaccine

name: CMCOVVAX
label: CM Date of COVID vaccine (computed in FC J-23b)
